overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a post-apocalyptic open-world game. A character equipped with a backpack and weapons walks steadily down an abandoned mountain road, passing deceased figures and approaching abandoned vehicles in a rugged wilderness setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain highway with rocky cliffs and pine forest

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the center of the abandoned road toward the distant mountain peak

entered.detail: large rocky mountain dominating the horizon with snow-capped peaks
wooden utility poles with wires running parallel to the road
steep rocky terrain with sparse vegetation
dense evergreen trees lining the right side of the road
cracked two-lane road with faded yellow center lines

segments.scene_description: The character walks down an empty mountain highway under a partly cloudy sky. Rocky cliffs rise on the left while pine forests cover the right slope, with a prominent mountain peak visible in the distance. Power lines run parallel to the road on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved mountain road with roadside debris

events.description: character passes close by a deceased figure lying in the middle of the road

agents.ego_description: continuing down the road while approaching and passing a body lying on the asphalt

entered.detail: body lying face-down in the center of the road wearing dark clothing
diamond-shaped warning sign indicating a curve ahead
abandoned blue car parked on the right shoulder of the road
steep rocky hillside with scattered trees

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, a deceased figure becomes visible in the road ahead. The character passes the body around the 30-second mark. A yellow road sign and an abandoned blue sedan come into view as the road curves through the rocky terrain.

events.description: approaching cluster of abandoned vehicles and distant camp structures

agents.ego_description: walking past multiple deceased figures and abandoned cars while approaching a distant settlement

entered.detail: second body lying on the left side of the road
third body lying in the road near the blue sedan
collection of structures and vehicles visible in the valley ahead

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an abandoned blue sedan parked on the right shoulder, passing several more deceased figures scattered along the road. In the distance, a small settlement or camp with multiple structures becomes visible as the road descends slightly toward the valley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate mountain highway that gradually descends from a rugged wilderness toward a distant settlement. It begins with the character walking under a partly cloudy sky, flanked by towering rocky cliffs and dense pine forests with a prominent mountain peak looming in the distance. As the character progresses, the road curves through the rocky terrain, revealing a yellow road sign and a deceased figure lying in the path. The scene then shifts as the camera passes an abandoned blue sedan parked on the shoulder and several more scattered bodies along the roadside. Finally, the road descends slightly toward a valley, opening up the view to a small camp with multiple structures in the distance.
